name: brand-manager-bridge
description: Voice-first content production tools for the brand-manager workspace. Records voice, runs the voice→content pipeline, exposes brand assets to Copilot.

commands.title: Brand Manager: Setup Wizard — Bootstrap Your Brand
Brand Manager: Run Voice → Content Pipeline
Brand Manager: Sync Content to Google Drive

brandManager.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter for running scripts/. Defaults to system python3.

brandManager.homework.reminderIntervalHo.description: Periodic homework reminder interval in hours. 0 disables interval reminders (startup once-per-day reminder still runs).

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_loadBrand
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read database/brand.json and return the full brand configuration (positioning, voice, audio settings, content pillars, offers).

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_loadVisualStyle
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read database/visual-style.json and return the brand visual aesthetic (palette, composition rules, prohibitions, people policy).

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_runVoiceToContent
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run scripts/voice_to_content.py on a given voice WAV file. Returns the JSON manifest of produced artifacts (transcript, bed, mixed audio, content brief, cover image, waveform video).

voiceFile.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the voice WAV.

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_listOverdueLeads
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run scripts/manage_leads.py due and return the list of leads with overdue follow-ups.

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_listHomework
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return strategic homework items from database/homework.json. Each item has id, step, title, category, priority, status, ai_doable (whether AI can draft it), ai_action (the command to run), owner_action, and notes. By default returns only open items (not done, not skipped).

open_only.description: If true (default), return only items not yet done or skipped. If false, return everything.

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_executeHomework
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run the ai_action command for a specific homework item id. Only works for items where ai_doable is true. Returns the script output. After running, the item moves to in-progress; the owner reviews the draft and marks done with brandManager_markHomeworkDone.

id.description: The homework item id to execute (e.g. 'uvp-and-proof', 'audience-matrix').

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_markHomeworkDone
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Mark a homework item as done by id. Use after the owner has reviewed and approved an AI draft, or after they've completed an owner-only task.

id.description: The homework item id to mark done.

languageModelTools.name: brandManager_analyzeMeeting
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run scripts/process_meeting.py analyze on a transcript string. Returns proposals JSON for homework status updates, brand DNA refinements, new leads, action items, and a meeting notes markdown. Does NOT write anything to disk — proposals are returned for the owner to approve. To apply approved proposals, the owner uses the Meeting Review webview (command: brandManager.openMeetingReview).
